title: Chopper Faces Death
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on chopper faces death, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Faces Death. Chopper learns what Hiriluk believes about medicine, hope, and the cherry blossom dream that can heal a country. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm..

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: going to die, aren't I...?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee he

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yes, you will...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: In 3~4 days, I take it?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Oh? I'm surprised a quack doctor can actually figure out how long he's got.

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Is there anything you can do to help me?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Still can't let go?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It might be a lot easier and less painful if you just bit the dust already.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee he

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I still have work left to finish.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I only need a little more time...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I HAVE TO FINISH THE WORK I'VE SPENT OVER 30 YEARS ON.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: If you want to live so badly,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Why don't you go to that country out in the Far West again?

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Maybe there, you can see your little "miracle Cherry Blossoms" again...

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: The ones that saved the great thief Hiriluk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no use for that,

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Because I'll bring the cherry blossoms here to this island instead...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ridiculous... Did you forget this is a winter-island where it's freezing cold all year long?

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Ain't no cherry blossoms ever gonna bloom here!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: They will bloom!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Those cherry blossoms not only saved the worthless life of a crook, but cleansed his very soul...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I was personal witness to its miraculous healing powers!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Such miracles are indeed a reality in this world of ours!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And I want to prove it on this island where I was born!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll show that it's possible to save anyone in this world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But I need time... just a little more time...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You just don't know when to call it quits, do ya...?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What you're trying to do is neither medicine nor science.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: share

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Even if cherry blossoms did bloom here, the people will remain unchanged.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: LEAP!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: By the way...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What is that weird monster that seems to be following you...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Looks like it.. it's been lurking outside my house ever since you came.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What...!? It's following me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's been trying to keep itself hidden...

summary: This part highlights chopper faces death and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
